class.help: Mantiene las distintas Ofertas Laborales que se mostraran en la WEB.
class.label: Ofertas Laborales
class.name: OFERTA_LAB

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_oferta_lab as oi_oferta_lab, t0.c_oferta_lab as c_oferta_lab, t0.d_oferta_lab as d_oferta_lab, t0.f_oferta_lab as f_oferta_lab, t0.f_cierre as f_cierre, t0.c_sexo as c_sexo, t0.e_cantidad as e_cantidad, t0.e_exp_des as e_exp_des, t0.e_exp_hasta as e_exp_hasta, t0.d_mail as d_mail, t0.d_mail_alt_1 as d_mail_alt_1, t0.d_mail_alt_2 as d_mail_alt_2, t0.e_edad_desde as e_edad_desde, t0.e_edad_hasta as e_edad_hasta, SEC.policy, t0.c_oferta_lab as CODE, t0.d_oferta_lab as TEXT, t0.oi_pais as oi_pais, t0.oi_provincia as oi_provincia, t0.oi_localidad as oi_localidad, t0.oi_zona as oi_zona, t0.oi_seniority as oi_seniority, t0.oi_area_lab as oi_area_lab, t0.oi_nivel_estudio as oi_nivel_estudio, t0.oi_estado_civil as oi_estado_civil, t0.oi_uni_tpo_desde as oi_uni_tpo_desde, t0.oi_uni_tpo_hasta as oi_uni_tpo_hasta, t0.oi_personal as oi_personal FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_oferta_lab LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_oferta_lab asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_oferta_lab as oi_oferta_lab, SEC.policy FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_oferta_lab LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_oferta_lab asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Referencia
attribute.name: c_oferta_lab

attribute.description: Descripción de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Puesto
attribute.name: d_oferta_lab

attribute.description: Fecha de Inactivación de la AFJP.
attribute.label: Fecha Alta
attribute.name: f_oferta_lab

key.msg: Ya Existe una Oferta Laboral Para ese codigo
key.name: ak_iofertas_lab

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_oferta_lab) as CNT from POS03_OFERTAS_LAB Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.d_oferta_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.c_oferta_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve la cantidad de dias necesarios para que los reclamos se cierren automaticamente
resource.name: getParametro

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'POS\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'HORASVENCOFLAB\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_oferta_lab, POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_personal, POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.f_cierre, POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.c_oferta_lab, POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.d_oferta_lab, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_usuario_sistema as d_usuario FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.f_cierre > now() AND POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.f_cierre < {DateTime(Number(now()) + Number(#SOURCE:@d_valor) DIV 24)}ORDER BY oi_personal ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ENTIDAD
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILE('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades\\{%=#DOC:@d_usuario %}.ENTIDAD.XML')/ENTIDAD

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.OFERTA_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_oferta_lab) as CNT from POS03_OFERTAS_LAB Where (POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.f_cierre > Now() or ISNULL(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.f_cierre)) {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.d_oferta_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS03_OFERTAS_LAB.c_oferta_lab,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Retorna informacion sobre la oferta laboral. Pueden agregarse campos.
resource.name: infoOfertaLaboral

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT P03.oi_oferta_lab ,P03.f_cierre ,P03.c_oferta_lab ,P03.d_oferta_lab ,P03.d_mail ,P03.d_mail_alt_1 ,P03.d_mail_alt_2
,P03.f_oferta_lab ,P03.c_sexo ,P03.o_oferta_lab ,P03.oi_pais ,P03.oi_provincia ,P03.oi_localidad ,P03.oi_zona ,P03.oi_seniority ,P03.oi_area_lab ,P03.oi_personal ,P03.oi_barrio ,P03.e_cantidad ,P03.e_exp_des ,P03.e_exp_hasta ,P03.e_edad_desde ,P03.e_edad_hasta ,P03.oi_nivel_estudio ,P03.oi_estado_civil ,P03.oi_uni_tpo_desde ,P03.oi_uni_tpo_hasta ,P03.l_publicacion_web ,P03.oi_empresa FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB AS P03 WHERE P03.oi_oferta_lab = {#SOURCE:@oi_oferta_lab} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Responde las peticiones de la Web de Ofertas Laborales V
method.name: WebOLManager

resource.description: Recupera las ultimas 5 ofertas laborales, si tiene oi_usuario_sistema filtra por las de ese usuario
resource.name: GET_OFERTASLAB_MAIN

qry:select.name: qryOfertaLabMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' maxsize 5 SELECT OL.oi_oferta_lab, OL.c_oferta_lab, OL.d_oferta_lab, OL.f_oferta_lab, OL.f_cierre, PER.d_ape_y_nom
FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as OL, PER01_PERSONAl as PER
JOIN OL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER.oi_personal
WHERE 1=1 {%?($PARAM/@oi_usuario_sistema!=''){% AND PER.oi_usuario_sistema = {$PARAM/@oi_usuario_sistema} %} {%%} %}
ORDER BY f_oferta_lab desc ,c_oferta_lab desc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCant
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POSTU.oi_oferta_lab,count(POSTU.oi_cv) as cantidad
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
GROUP BY POSTU.oi_oferta_lab
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/OFERTA-LABORAL join $r/@oi_oferta_lab inner $s/@oi_oferta_lab

resource.declare: <DATA mode="LISTOL" campo="c_oferta_lab" criterio="asc" estado="A" campo_buscar="" f_alta_desde="" f_alta_hasta="" f_cierre_desde="" f_cierre_hasta="" filtroPersona="Valía" oi_empresa="" oi_tipos_serv="1" oi_pais="" oi_provincia="" oi_localidad="" qryMode="LISTOL"/>
resource.description: Devuelve la Lista de ofertas laborales en funcion de los filtros
resource.name: GET_OFERTAS_LIST

qry:select.name: qryOfertaLabMain
qryCant
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POSTU.oi_oferta_lab,count(POSTU.oi_cv) as cantidad
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
GROUP BY POSTU.oi_oferta_lab
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/OFERTA-LABORAL join $r/@oi_oferta_lab inner $s/@oi_oferta_lab

resource.description: Datos de la Oferta Laboral en modo Consulta
resource.name: LOAD_OFERTA_LAB_SHOW

qry:select.name: qryOl
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OL.oi_oferta_lab, OL.c_oferta_lab, OL.d_oferta_lab, OL.o_oferta_lab, OL.f_oferta_lab, OL.f_cierre, OL.e_cantidad, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa, EMP.oi_logotipo as logo_emp, PROD.c_tipos_serv, PROD.d_tipos_serv, UNEG.oi_imagen_per as logo_un, TP.c_tipo_puesto, TP.d_tipo_puesto, SR.c_seniority, SR.d_seniority, AL.c_area_lab, AL.d_area_lab, PAIS.c_pais, PAIS.d_pais, PCIA.c_provincia, PCIA.d_provincia, LOC.c_localidad, LOC.d_localidad, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom, OL.d_mail, OL.d_mail_alt_1, OL.d_mail_alt_2, PAISRES.c_pais as c_pais_res, PAISRES.d_pais as d_pais_res, PCIARES.c_provincia as c_provincia_res, PCIARES.d_provincia as d_provincia_res, LOCRES.c_localidad as c_localidad_res, LOCRES.d_localidad as d_localidad_res, OL.l_exc_res, OL.e_exp_des, UTD.d_unidad_tiempo as ut_desde, OL.e_exp_hasta, UTH.d_unidad_tiempo as ut_hasta, OL.l_exc_exp, OL.e_edad_desde, OL.e_edad_hasta, OL.l_exc_edad, OL.c_sexo, OL.l_exc_sexo, ECIVIL.c_estado_civil, ECIVIL.d_estado_civil, OL.l_exc_ecivil, NIVEST.c_nivel_estudio, NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio, ESTEST.c_estado_est, ESTEST.d_estado_est, OL.l_exc_edu, ING.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_ingles, ING.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_ingles, POR.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_portugues, POR.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_portugues, FR.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_frances, FR.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_frances, IT.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_italiano, IT.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_italiano, ALE.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_aleman, ALE.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_aleman, JAP.c_nivel_idioma as c_nivel_japones, JAP.d_nivel_idioma as d_nivel_japones, OL.l_exc_idioma, OL.n_salario_d, OL.n_salario_h, OL.l_exc_salario, OL.l_mostrar_en_aviso, OL.l_solicita_sal, OL.oi_empresa
FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as OL, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, CLI15_TIPOS_SERV as PROD, POS29_TIPOS_PUESTO as TP, POS04_SENIORITY as SR, POS05_AREAS_LAB as AL, ORG35_PAISES as PAIS, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as PCIA, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LOC, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, ORG35_PAISES as PAISRES, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as PCIARES, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LOCRES, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as UTD, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as UTH, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as ECIVIL, PER12_NIVELES_EST as NIVEST, PER13_ESTADOS_EST as ESTEST, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as ING, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as POR, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as FR, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as IT, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as ALE, ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as JAP, CLI55_UNI_NEGOCIO as UNEG
JOIN OL.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER EMP.oi_empresa, OL.oi_tipos_serv LEFT OUTER PROD.oi_tipos_serv, OL.oi_tipo_puesto LEFT OUTER TP.oi_tipo_puesto, OL.oi_seniority LEFT OUTER SR.oi_seniority, OL.oi_area_lab LEFT OUTER AL.oi_area_lab, OL.oi_pais LEFT OUTER PAIS.oi_pais, OL.oi_provincia LEFT OUTER PCIA.oi_provincia, OL.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER LOC.oi_localidad, OL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER.oi_personal, OL.oi_pais_res LEFT OUTER PAISRES.oi_pais, OL.oi_provincia_res LEFT OUTER PCIARES.oi_provincia, OL.oi_localidad_res LEFT OUTER LOCRES.oi_localidad, OL.oi_uni_tpo_desde LEFT OUTER UTD.oi_unidad_tiempo, OL.oi_uni_tpo_hasta LEFT OUTER UTH.oi_unidad_tiempo, OL.oi_estado_civil LEFT OUTER ECIVIL.oi_estado_civil, OL.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER NIVEST.oi_nivel_estudio, OL.oi_estado_est LEFT OUTER ESTEST.oi_estado_est, OL.oi_nivel_ing LEFT OUTER ING.oi_nivel_idioma, OL.oi_nivel_por LEFT OUTER POR.oi_nivel_idioma, OL.oi_nivel_fr LEFT OUTER FR.oi_nivel_idioma, OL.oi_nivel_it LEFT OUTER IT.oi_nivel_idioma, OL.oi_nivel_al LEFT OUTER ALE.oi_nivel_idioma, OL.oi_nivel_jap LEFT OUTER JAP.oi_nivel_idioma, PROD.oi_uni_negocio LEFT OUTER UNEG.oi_uni_negocio
WHERE OL.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryLogoParametro
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor
FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS
WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'oi_logotipo\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCant
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT count(POSTU.oi_cv) as cantidad
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
WHERE POSTU.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPreguntas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PREG.oi_pregunta, PREG.c_pregunta, PREG.d_pregunta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS as PREG
WHERE PREG.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryOpcionesPreg
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OP.oi_pregunta_op, OP.d_pregunta_op, OP.l_correcta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS_OP as OP
WHERE OP.oi_pregunta = {$PARAM/@oi_pregunta}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Carga los datos del form de Oferta Laboral que no dependen de otros valores
resource.name: LOAD_OFERTA_LAB_FORM

qry:select.name: qryEmpresas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT EMP.oi_empresa, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa
FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP
ORDER BY c_empresa asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPaises
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT P.oi_pais, P.c_pais, P.d_pais
FROM ORG35_PAISES as P
WHERE LEN(c_pais)=4 ORDER BY c_pais asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qrySeniority
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT S.oi_seniority, S.c_seniority, S.d_seniority
FROM POS04_SENIORITY as S
ORDER BY c_seniority asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryAreasLab
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT AL.oi_area_lab, AL.c_area_lab, AL.d_area_lab
FROM POS05_AREAS_LAB as AL
ORDER BY c_area_lab asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNivelEst
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT NIVEST.oi_nivel_estudio, NIVEST.c_nivel_estudio, NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio
FROM PER12_NIVELES_EST as NIVEST
ORDER BY c_nivel_estudio asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryEstadosCiviles
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ECV.oi_estado_civil, ECV.c_estado_civil, ECV.d_estado_civil
FROM ORG22_EST_CIVIL as ECV
ORDER BY c_estado_civil asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryMail
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in file('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades\\{%=$proxy/@etty%}.ENTIDAD.XML')/ENTIDAD

qry:select.name: qryPersona
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER
WHERE PER.oi_usuario_sistema = {$proxy/@etty}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryEstadoEst
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ESTEST.oi_estado_est, ESTEST.c_estado_est, ESTEST.d_estado_est
FROM PER13_ESTADOS_EST as ESTEST
ORDER BY c_estado_Est asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNivIdioma
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT NIVID.oi_nivel_idioma, NIVID.c_nivel_idioma, NIVID.d_nivel_idioma
FROM ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA as NIVID
ORDER BY c_nivel_idioma asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryTiposPuestos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT TP.oi_tipo_puesto, TP.c_tipo_puesto, TP.d_tipo_puesto
FROM POS29_TIPOS_PUESTO as TP
ORDER BY c_tipo_puesto asc ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Carga los hijos correspondientes para el load del form de ofertas laborales segun modo de qry
resource.name: LOAD_CHILD_OL_FORM

qry:select.name: qryLoadProducto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PROD.oi_tipos_serv, PROD.c_tipos_serv, PROD.d_tipos_serv
FROM CLI31_PROD_HAB as REQ, CLI15_TIPOS_SERV as PROD
JOIN REQ.oi_tipos_serv INNER PROD.oi_tipos_serv
WHERE REQ.oi_empresa = {$PARAM/@filterParent}
ORDER BY c_tipos_serv asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPcias
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PCIA.oi_provincia, PCIA.d_provincia
FROM ORG35_PROVINCIAS as PCIA
WHERE PCIA.oi_pais = {$PARAM/@filterParent} ORDER BY d_provincia asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryLoadLocalidad
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT LOC.oi_localidad, LOC.c_localidad, LOC.d_localidad
FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LOC
WHERE LOC.oi_provincia = {$PARAM/@filterParent}
ORDER BY c_localidad asc ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Carga los datos para los combos de filtro de la pantalla de lista de ofertas laborales
resource.name: LOAD_OFERTA_LAB_LIST

qry:select.name: qryPersonas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER
ORDER BY c_personal asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryEmpresas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT EMP.oi_empresa, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa
FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP
ORDER BY c_empresa asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPaises
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT P.oi_pais, P.c_pais, P.d_pais
FROM ORG35_PAISES as P
WHERE LEN(c_pais)=4 ORDER BY c_pais asc
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATA PYC="" oi_pedido="" qryMode="LISTPOSTUCV" campoResumen="d_puesto" campo="d_ape_y_nom" criterio="asc" oi_oferta_lab="40" noCalculaPuesto="1" noCalculaEmpresa="1" noCalculaTitulo="1" noCalculaLocalidad="1" campo_buscar_1="" campo_buscar_2="" campo_buscar_3="" campo_buscar_4="" campo_buscar_5="" campo_buscar_6="" campo_buscar_7="" campo_buscar_8="" campo_buscar_9="" campo_buscar_10="" l_leido="" c_marca="" l_notas="" d_puesto="" d_empresa="" d_estudio="" d_localidad="" l_cumple_req="0" />
resource.description: Recupera los CVs postulados a una oferta laboral
resource.name: GET_CV_OFERTA_LAB

qry:select.name: qryListPostuCV
qryExperienciaUltima
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ACV.oi_cv, ACV.d_empresa, ACV.f_egreso
FROM POS01_ANTEC_CV as ACV
WHERE ACV.oi_cv in ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
ORDER BY f_egreso asc
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryExperienciaActual
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ACV.oi_cv, ACV.d_empresa
FROM POS01_ANTEC_CV as ACV
WHERE isNull(ACV.f_egreso) AND ACV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryEstudioUltimo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ECV.oi_cv, E.d_estudio, ECV.oi_nivel_estudio
FROM POS01_ESTUDIOS_CV as ECV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as E
JOIN ECV.oi_estudio INNER E.oi_estudio
WHERE ECV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
ORDER BY oi_nivel_estudio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryEstudioActual
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT E.d_estudio, ECV.oi_cv
FROM POS01_ESTUDIOS_CV as ECV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as E
JOIN ECV.oi_estudio INNER E.oi_estudio
WHERE ECV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%}) AND ECV.oi_nivel_estudio = 12
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryNotas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT N.oi_nota, N.oi_cv
FROM POS01_NOTAS_CV as N
WHERE N.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryPreguntas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT P.oi_postu_resp, P.oi_postulaciones
FROM POS01_POSTU_RESP as P
WHERE P.oi_postulaciones IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_postulaciones)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_postulaciones inner $s/@oi_postulaciones

resource.description: Origenes de datos para graficos de Postulaciones a Ofertas laborales
resource.name: GRAPHIC

qry:select.name: qrySexo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.c_sexo
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS, POS01_CV as CV
JOIN CV.oi_cv INNER POS.oi_cv
WHERE POS.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryEdad
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.oi_cv, CV.edad
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS, VW_BUSCAR_CV as CV
JOIN POS.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv
WHERE POS.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
GROUP BY CV.oi_cv, CV.edad
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNivEst
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio, COUNT(POSTU.oi_cv) as cant
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU, POS01_CV as CV, PER12_NIVELES_EST as NIVEST
JOIN POSTU.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv, CV.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER NIVEST.oi_nivel_estudio
WHERE POSTU.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
GROUP BY NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qrySalario
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.n_remuneracion
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS, POS01_CV as CV
JOIN POS.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv
WHERE
CV.n_remuneracion >0 AND POS.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPostulaciones
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT COUNT(D.f_postulacion) as CANT, D.f_postulacion
FROM (
SELECT DATE2STRING(POS.f_postulacion) as f_postulacion
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS
WHERE POS.oi_oferta_lab = {%=$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab%} AND isNotNull(POS.f_postulacion)
) as D
GROUP BY D.f_postulacion
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPostulacionesViejas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POS.f_postulacion
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS
WHERE POS.oi_oferta_lab = {%=$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab%} AND isNotNull(POS.f_postulacion)
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryOrigenesAviso
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ORI.d_origen_aviso, count(POSTU.oi_origen_aviso) as cant
FROM POS30_ORIGENES_AVISO as ORI, POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
JOIN ORI.oi_origen_aviso LEFT OUTER POSTU.oi_origen_aviso
WHERE POSTU.oi_oferta_lab = {%=$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab%} GROUP BY ORI.d_origen_aviso
ORDER BY cant DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPreguntaChoice
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PREG.oi_pregunta, PREG.d_pregunta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS as PREG
WHERE PREG.c_pregunta = \'M\' AND PREG.oi_oferta_lab = {%=$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab%}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCantRespuestasPreguntas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT count(RESP.oi_pregunta) as cantTotalResp
FROM POS01_POSTU_RESP as RESP
WHERE RESP.oi_pregunta = {$DOCPREG/@oi_pregunta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryOpcionesChoice
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OP.oi_pregunta_op, OP.d_pregunta_op, OP.l_correcta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS_OP as OP
WHERE OP.oi_pregunta = {%=$PAR/@oi_pregunta%}
ORDER BY l_correcta desc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCantRespuestasChoice
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT count(RESP.oi_postu_resp) as cantResp
FROM POS01_POSTU_RESP as RESP
WHERE RESP.oi_pregunta_op = {$DOCRES/@oi_pregunta_op}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera el mail destino parametro para enviar el aviso de la creacion de la oferta laboral
resource.name: GET_MAIL_OL

qry:select.name: qryMail
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor
FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS
WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'MailOFLAB\'
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Calcula para una oferta laboral la cantidad de postulacion que tiene y cuantas de estas cumplen y no cumplen con los requisitos
resource.name: QRY_CANT_REQ

qry:select.name: qryReq
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POS.l_cumple_req
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POS
WHERE POS.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera todas las ofertas laborales abiertas para la lista de la web
resource.name: WEB_GET_OFERTA_LAB

qry:select.name: qryGetOls
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OL.oi_oferta_lab, OL.d_oferta_lab, OL.f_oferta_lab, OL.o_oferta_lab, OL.c_oferta_lab, OL.f_cierre, OL.e_cantidad, OL.oi_tipo_puesto, OL.oi_seniority, OL.oi_area_lab, OL.oi_pais, OL.oi_provincia, OL.oi_localidad, OL.oi_pais_res, OL.oi_provincia_res, OL.oi_localidad_res, OL.e_exp_des, OL.oi_uni_tpo_desde, OL.e_exp_hasta, OL.oi_uni_tpo_hasta, OL.e_edad_desde, OL.e_edad_hasta, OL.c_sexo, OL.oi_estado_civil, OL.oi_nivel_estudio, OL.oi_estado_est, OL.oi_nivel_ing, OL.oi_nivel_por, OL.oi_nivel_fr, OL.oi_nivel_it, OL.oi_nivel_al, OL.oi_nivel_jap, OL.n_salario_d, OL.n_salario_h, OL.l_exc_res, OL.l_exc_exp, OL.l_exc_edad, OL.l_exc_sexo, OL.l_exc_ecivil, OL.l_exc_edu, OL.l_exc_idioma, OL.l_exc_salario, OL.d_mail, OL.d_mail_alt_1, OL.d_mail_alt_2, OL.l_solicita_sal, OL.l_mostrar_en_aviso, OL.l_mostrar_res, OL.l_mostrar_exp, OL.l_mostrar_edad, OL.l_mostrar_sexo, OL.l_mostrar_edu, OL.l_mostrar_idioma, OL.l_mostrar_ecivil, EMP.oi_empresa, UNEG.c_uni_negocio, UNEG.d_uni_negocio, PROD.c_tipos_serv
FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as OL, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, CLI15_TIPOS_SERV as PROD, CLI55_UNI_NEGOCIO as UNEG
JOIN OL.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER EMP.oi_empresa, OL.oi_tipos_serv LEFT OUTER PROD.oi_tipos_serv, PROD.oi_uni_negocio LEFT OUTER UNEG.oi_uni_negocio
WHERE (OL.f_oferta_lab >= {datetime(number(now())-90)} AND isnull(OL.f_cierre)) OR (OL.f_cierre >= now())
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPreguntas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PREG.oi_pregunta, PREG.d_pregunta, PREG.c_pregunta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS as PREG
WHERE PREG.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryOpciones
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OP.oi_pregunta_op, OP.d_pregunta_op
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS_OP as OP
WHERE OP.oi_pregunta = {$PARAM/@oi_pregunta}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera los datos de cabecera de la postulacion para un oi_oferta_lab
resource.name: GET_OFERTA_LAB_HEAD

qry:select.name: qryOL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OL.c_oferta_lab, OL.d_oferta_lab, PER.d_ape_y_nom, OL.f_cierre
FROM POS03_OFERTAS_LAB as OL, PER01_PERSONAl as PER
JOIN OL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER.oi_personal
WHERE OL.oi_oferta_lab= {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Define si el usuario tiene cuenta de sistema, para poder crear ofertas laborales
resource.name: IS_ACTIVE_USER

qry:select.name: qryPersona
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PER.oi_personal
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER
WHERE PER.oi_usuario_sistema = {$proxy/@etty}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera las respuestas de usuario de una postulacion
resource.name: GET_RESPUESTAS

qry:select.name: qryPreg
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT PREG.oi_pregunta, PREG.d_pregunta, PREG.c_pregunta, PR.d_respuesta, PR.oi_pregunta_op
FROM POS01_POSTU_RESP as PR, POS03_PREGUNTAS as PREG
JOIN PR.oi_pregunta LEFT OUTER PREG.oi_pregunta
WHERE PR.oi_postulaciones = {$PARAM/@oi_postulaciones}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryOpciones
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT OP.oi_pregunta_op, OP.d_pregunta_op, OP.l_correcta
FROM POS03_PREGUNTAS_OP as OP
WHERE OP.oi_pregunta = {$PARAM/@oi_pregunta}
') ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera todas los CVs de la postulacion para actualizar el cumplimiento de los mismos
resource.name: GET_POSTU_CV

qry:select.name: qryGet
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POSTU.oi_postulaciones, POSTU.oi_cv
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
WHERE POSTU.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve 1 si tiene postulaciones la oferta, para tener en cuenta a la hora de editar
resource.name: TIENE_POSTU

qry:select.name: qryCant
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT POSTU.oi_postulaciones
FROM POS01_POSTU_CV as POSTU
WHERE POSTU.oi_oferta_lab = {$PARAM/@oi_oferta_lab}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.name: GET_RESP_PREG
resource.description: Devuelve los ids de las respuestas a la pregunta parametro

qry:select.name: qry1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT RESP.oi_postu_resp
FROM POS01_POSTU_RESP as RESP
WHERE RESP.oi_pregunta = {$PARAM/@oi_pregunta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab) as CNT from POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB, POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS join POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.OI_CONOCIMIENTO inner POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.OI_CONOCIMIENTO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.d_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.c_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab) as CNT from POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB, POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS join POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.OI_CONOCIMIENTO inner POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.OI_CONOCIMIENTO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.d_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.c_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.CONOC_OF_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab) as CNT from POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB, POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS join POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.OI_CONOCIMIENTO inner POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.OI_CONOCIMIENTO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_conoc_of_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.d_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS.c_conocimiento,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and POS03_CONOC_OF_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.IDIOM_OF_LAB.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Ofertas_Laborales.IDIOM_OF_LAB.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS03_IDIOM_OF_LAB.oi_idiom_of_lab) as CNT from POS03_IDIOM_OF_LAB, ORG20_IDIOMAS join POS03_IDIOM_OF_LAB.OI_IDIOMA inner ORG20_IDIOMAS.OI_IDIOMA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS03_IDIOM_OF_LAB.oi_idiom_of_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG20_IDIOMAS.d_idioma,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG20_IDIOMAS.c_idioma,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and POS03_IDIOM_OF_LAB.oi_oferta_lab={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
